title: Garbage worm

The '''garbage worm''' was a genetically-manufactured creature, and one of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] most primitive and essential organisms to the garbage handling system. Any trash not packaged for [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] export was mixed with oils to be processed by the garbage worms. They chewed it down to tiny pellets, removing any last bits of organics, [[Plastic/Legends|plastic]], or recoverable metal. They reduced millions of tons of these pellets into [[Carbon dioxide/Legends|carbon dioxide]], [[Methane/Legends|methane]], and other organics.

Thousands, if not millions of worms occupied the garbage level of the city-planet. Their [[Glass/Legends|glass]]-like scales were large and loose, prized by collectors for their glittery quality. The largest worms were up to several hundred meters long and three or four [[Meter/Legends|meters]] wide in diameter. Their bodies had lines of small blue-black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].

Rumor had it that a garbage worm could eat a useless [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive core]] and survive—at least, for a few [[Standard second|seconds]].

The creatures were also found on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] and [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]].

==Use in sports==
These creatures were a large part of illegal garbage [[pit racing]], where a contestant had to take a scale from the worm and bring it back to the finish. Their scales also served as sports memorabilia in the racing culture.
